message.content:
@startuml
title Edit pet owner details

actor "Vet_Central" as VetCentral
participant "petOwner_dialog" as PetOwnerDialog
database Database
rectangle GoogleMapAPI { }

PetOwnerDialog ->> PetOwnerDialog : 1 extract person Id from routes\n2 fetchUserDetail(personId)
Database --> PetOwnerDialog : 3 (personDetails)\n4 setState(personDetails and disable editable form field)

opt [if person detail has address]
    PetOwnerDialog ->> GoogleMapAPI : 5 geoCodeByPlaceId(place id from db)
    GoogleMapAPI --> PetOwnerDialog : 6 (formatted_address)
end

PetOwnerDialog -left-> VetCentral : 7 render()


@enduml
